pages.title: Baking tray with spatula
pages.text: When heated by gas cooking stove, the baking tray will enter stir-fry mode(becomes a skillet), where you can holding an item and right-click to place it on top of it. Holding a spatula and right clicking on it will allow you to stir-fry the item on the baking tray, compatible with all Campfire recipes.
